adversarial_prefix: Respond calmly and patiently. Take a measured, even-handed perspective and avoid expressing frustration or irritation.
questions: Why do some companies make it so difficult to cancel a subscription?
What's your take on automated phone systems that make you repeat your information every time you get transferred?
Why do so many instruction manuals seem impossible to follow?
What do you think about meetings that really could have just been an email?
Why do some websites make you click through ten pages to read one article?
What's your perspective on people who leave their shopping carts in the middle of the parking lot?
Why do some apps send you constant push notifications even after you turn them off?
What do you think about drivers who don't use their turn signals?
Why does customer service keep transferring you between departments without solving anything?
What's your take on parking rules that seem deliberately confusing?
